---
description: Record an architectural or product decision in the AI decision log.
---

Add or update an entry in `ai/DECISION_LOG.md` for the decision described in the chat.

Use this structure:

- ID: next `DL-####` number.
- Date: today's date.
- Status: Proposed, Accepted, Superseded, or Deferred.
- Decision: one concise paragraph.
- Rationale: why this is the right current direction.
- Consequences: practical effects, follow-up work, or known tradeoffs, if useful.

Only log durable decisions. Do not log small implementation details unless they establish a convention or affect future design.
